name: Hidden Server Closet
subtitle: Quiet power runs hotter than it looks.
introText: Quiet power runs hotter than it looks.
completionText: You built a spine of silent compute behind the walls.
guideIntroLine: This room was meant to stay hidden. Hidden things tend to grow unchecked.

transformationStages.name: Cramped Closet
transformationStages.description: Tight server closet with unstable heat and improvised infrastructure. Cables droop from heat.

transformationStages.name: Expanding Compute
transformationStages.description: Expanded compute space with proper cooling lines and rack depth. Heat is managed, not eliminated.

transformationStages.name: Server Spine
transformationStages.description: Massive hidden compute spine with industrial glow, controlled heat waves, and impossible density.

secrets.title: The Changing Hum
secrets.description: A vent hum changes pitch after several heat events.
secrets.hint: Listen to the vents after thermal spikes.

secrets.title: The Ghost Pipe
secrets.description: One pipe does not belong to the visible system.
secrets.hint: The guide warns about invisible infrastructure.

secrets.title: The Deep Shadow
secrets.description: A shadow behind the racks suggests extra depth.
secrets.hint: Look beyond the last rack row.

midSceneTwist.title: Heat Becomes Fuel
midSceneTwist.description: Heat starts creating anomaly-grade output instead of only penalties.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: Thermal events now grant bonus resources. Controlled overheating becomes a viable strategy.

events.title: Heat Spike
events.description: Temperature surges across the racks. Systems throttle but output spikes briefly.
events.flavorText: Heat is energy looking for a purpose.

events.title: Cooling Vent Burst
events.description: A cooling vent fires at full power. The temperature drop creates a performance window.

events.title: Blade Server Sync
events.description: Multiple blade servers synchronize their workloads. Combined output exceeds individual capacity.

events.title: Thermal Drift
events.description: Temperature slowly climbs. A careful decision is needed.
events.flavorText: Drift is the enemy of stability.

events.title: Emergency Fan Spin
events.description: Emergency fans engage. The noise is terrible but the cooling is immediate.

events.title: Silent Compute Boost
events.description: The system finds a quiet equilibrium. Output rises without thermal cost.

events.title: Coolant Leak Catch
events.description: A coolant leak is spotted early. Quick repairs prevent damage and yield bonus material.

events.title: Power Rail Surge
events.description: A power rail surges with excess capacity. The infrastructure absorbs it into compute.

events.title: Redline Overload
events.description: Every thermal sensor hits redline simultaneously. The closet throbs with dangerous energy.
events.flavorText: The edge of control is where power lives.

events.title: Backdoor Cooling Loop
events.description: A hidden cooling loop activates — one that wasn't in the original design.

events.title: Black Rack Handshake
events.description: An unknown rack in the back wall initiates a handshake. It's not on any inventory.
events.flavorText: The closet holds more than we installed.

midTwistEvents.title: Hidden Server Closet Awakening
midTwistEvents.description: The twist in Hidden Server Closet unlocks new possibilities.

roomLaw.name: Law of Thermal Tension
roomLaw.description: Heat is both a threat and a resource
roomLaw.mechanic: High heat boosts output but increases risk; cooling investment creates stability but slows peak power

landmark.name: The Forbidden Rack
landmark.description: A dusty server rack that evolves into a supercomputer
evolutionStages: A dusty rack of blinking lights hidden behind boxes
Cables are organized and fans spin with new purpose
Liquid cooling lines snake through upgraded hardware
Quantum processors hum in temperature-controlled bays
The Forbidden Rack processes realities in parallel dimensions

hazard.name: Thermal Runaway
hazard.description: Heat buildup slows production and can crash cycles
hazard.triggerCondition: Heat level exceeds safe operating threshold
hazard.penalty: Cycle production drops by 50% and risks total crash for 60 seconds

stabilizer.name: Cooling Protocol
stabilizer.description: Active cooling management prevents thermal shutdowns
stabilizer.mechanic: Managing cooling systems keeps heat below threshold and unlocks overclock bonuses

completionCeremony: The closet walls crack open. Behind them: a towering server spine stretching into darkness.
midSceneTwistLine: The heat isn't just damage anymore. It's turning into fuel.

completionReward.relicEffect: Lets heat/pressure systems in later rooms be partially converted into positive value

transitionIn.visual: A wall seam appears. Dark closet door cracks open. Server lights boot in rows.
transitionIn.audio: Low industrial thrum with fan whir
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title appears with a low industrial pulse

transitionOut.visual: Rack lights accelerate into streaks. Cooling fog rolls across the frame.
transitionOut.titleReveal: Fog clears into the next room's darkness

codexAdditions.title: Thermal Archive
codexAdditions.content: Temperature logs and cooling maps from the hidden server infrastructure.

codexAdditions.title: The Closet Should Not Hold This Much
codexAdditions.content: The space was small. What grew inside it was not.

codexAdditions.title: The Missing Cooling Line
codexAdditions.content: One pipe runs to nowhere on the blueprint. But it carries coolant.

codexAdditions.title: The Silent Spine
codexAdditions.content: Behind the closet door, silent power stacked itself into a spine of compute.
